name: Version 7 Post-Classification Parallel Category Routing Runtime
summary: A token-efficient batch runtime that classifies each official task locally, routes by a locked category policy, uses Fireworks Kimi for five categories, uses bundled local Nemotron for three categories, and writes the official minimal result file.
publication_state: public final-policy image accessible and anonymously pullable

official_runtime_contract.input: Top-level /input/tasks.json array with task_id and prompt records.
official_runtime_contract.output: Top-level /output/results.json array with task_id and answer records only.
official_runtime_contract.startup: container startup runs the batch automatically and exits
official_runtime_contract.http_server: none except internal child Ollama service on loopback

final_constraints: bundled local Ollama and Nemotron model are present in the submitted image
no hosted provider other than Fireworks
Fireworks calls use FIREWORKS_BASE_URL and FIREWORKS_API_KEY
Fireworks model IDs are resolved from ALLOWED_MODELS
official results contain no audit or routing metadata
fallback_history: Version 6 remains preserved in Dockerfile.version6 as known-good fallback evidence, not the active official runtime.
